GitHub Actions workflow for building and storing firmware artifacts for multiple board configurations.

# Purpose
The YAML configuration file defines a GitHub Actions workflow named `Build Firmware`. This workflow triggers on `push` events to the `main` branch and on `pull_request` events affecting specified paths. The workflow consists of a single job named `build`, which runs on an `ubuntu-24.04` environment using a specified Docker container image. The job employs a matrix strategy to build firmware for multiple board types, including `snowy_bb2`, `spalding_bb2`, `silk_bb2`, and `asterix`. The steps in the job include marking the GitHub workspace as safe, checking out the repository, installing Python dependencies, configuring the build environment for each board, building the firmware, bundling the build artifacts, and storing the resulting firmware files as artifacts.
